{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323153422DE1C135CFBFC7DB4B2CC"}"},"total":49},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7450465681707926297","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"妈啊，楚然表妹竟然做妾，等同奴才，无论怎讲楚然大将军也默认，丢楚然的脸，无语，"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734702420,"group_id":"7425839823660796990","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"93737047769"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7425839823660796990","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"347"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"4","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":36114,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7437074865511547673","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"爽文但有些内容，不会空洞。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1731582596,"group_id":"7425839823660796990","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0MfZv7fyXq7ypu9O+TQUHU=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790605&x-signature=YlzhmTSXCiJ8jjqgO%2BoHwuKOIgo%3D","user_id":"93737047769","user_name":"爱吃酸酱的方斯年"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"93737047769","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1721112250,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7425839823660796990","book_info":{"abstract":"（女强，基建，爽文，无系统，稳定更新）
楚然一朝穿越到龙腾王朝，成了一名买官上任的七品县令。
虽然说青山县只是一个不起眼的小县城，但是这里的百姓依然十分热爱自己的家乡。
当青山县的豪绅顾老爷得知他们青山县新上任的县令居然是一个买官上任的草包，并且还是一位女子的时候，对楚然表示了极大的抵触。
而楚然也在刚刚来到青山县上任的时候，就遇到了青山县10年一遇的大雪灾，青山县作为地处于连绵不绝的山中，对外交通全靠驴车。
雪灾封路，外面的取暖物资运不回青山县，青山县的百姓们这个冬天可是要挨冻了，而楚然又要如何解决这个困境呢？
随着一个又一个的难题逐渐解决，楚然的名字也越传越广，直至传遍大江南北。
她的官职越来越高，彻底让整个龙腾王朝对楚然的印象截然转变。
谁都没有想到，当初只不过是买官上任的楚然，最后居然能坐到万人之上的位置，甚至改变他们整个龙腾王朝的走向。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o2ea2e28a44125922c43eb6e5d87f85bf~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"阿萨姆奶茶","author_id":"","book_id":"7425839823660796990","book_name":"一品女官员，从县令开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#484040","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7425839943735640638","read_count":"509","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"743814"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.7","serial_count":"371","tags":"种田,古代言情,穿越,女强,基建,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/36bce549566ae0049fca9bd1e33df55d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435262&x-signature=6RCc7cD0a37OXgaFgIexOnuWiYU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2040335424035032","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"199"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323153422DE1C135CFBFC7DB4B2CC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"d
